proven.claim: Proven: lines 486 and 487 execute together; reason is truthy at both
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 487
; Proven: lines 486 and 487 execute together; reason is truthy at both
(declare-const reason_truthy Int)
(declare-const line_486_reached Int)
(declare-const line_487_reached Int)
; Code transition: no branch exists between line 486 and 487
(assert (= line_486_reached line_487_reached))
; Code transition: reason truthy is required to reach line 486
(assert (=> (= line_486_reached 1) (= reason_truthy 1)))
; Line 487 is reached
(assert (= line_487_reached 1))
; Negated property: reason is falsy at line 487
(assert (= reason_truthy 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: Violation: --no-verify skips ALL git hooks; recommendation scope exceeds stated intent
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 487
; Violation: --no-verify skips ALL git hooks; recommendation scope exceeds stated intent
(declare-const no_verify_recommended Int)   ; 1 = tool outputs "git commit --no-verify"
(declare-const neurallog_hook_bypassed Int) ; 1 = neurallog pre-commit hook skipped
(declare-const other_hooks_bypassed Int)    ; 1 = non-neurallog hooks also skipped
; Code transition: line 487 emits "git commit --no-verify"
(assert (= no_verify_recommended 1))
; Semantic: --no-verify skips ALL hooks in .git/hooks/, not one specific hook
(assert (=> (= no_verify_recommended 1) (= neurallog_hook_bypassed 1)))
(assert (=> (= no_verify_recommended 1) (= other_hooks_bypassed 1)))
; Violation: collateral hook bypass — linting, signing, secret-scanning hooks also skipped
(assert (= other_hooks_bypassed 1))
(check-sat)
